title: CVE-2023-24025 — CVSS 7.5 (HIGH)
content:
# CVE-2023-24025

CVSS Score: 7.5 (HIGH)
Published: 2023-01-20T21:15:11.273
CWEs: CWE-347, CWE-347

CRYSTALS-DILITHIUM (in Post-Quantum Cryptography Selected Algorithms 2022) in PQClean d03da30 may allow universal forgeries of digital signatures via a template side-channel attack because of intermediate data leakage of one vector.

References: https://csrc.nist.gov/Projects/post-quantum-cryptography/selected-algorithms-2022, https://eprint.iacr.org/2023/050, https://github.com/PQClean/PQClean/tree/d03da3053491e767ef842deaef43fc5bdb6bc911
